# Module Contract

## Module

Name the module, feature, or workflow this contract covers.

## Owning Layer

State which project layer owns the truth for this contract.

## Files Owned By This Contract

- 

## Public Interface

List the functions, classes, scripts, environment variables, sheet tabs, columns, or payload fields that other code may depend on.

## Inputs

For each input, include type, source, required fields, optional fields, and example values.

## Outputs

For each output, include type, destination, field names, row shape, and whether the value is provisional or final.

## Invariants

Rules that must always stay true.

- 

## Error Behavior

Describe what should happen on malformed input, missing source data, partial workbook state, webhook failure, or unavailable external data.

## Side Effects

List files written, runtime state touched, webhooks posted, workbook tabs updated, or caches refreshed.

## Dependency Order

If multiple files or layers change together, list the required edit order.

1. 

## Compatibility

Name any legacy names, bridge code, old tabs, old fields, or migration behavior that must remain supported.

## Tests Required

List focused unit, integration, replay, Apps Script, or workbook-visible checks.
